reviews.comment:
Realicé una carga de combustible en la  ACA ACCESO NORTE I
y me entregaron la tapa de combustible rota en la mano, imposible de colocar.
No se hacen cargo de sus errores.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up my tank at the North Access I ACA, and they handed me a broken fuel cap, impossible to replace.
They're not responsible for their mistakes.
